identity.objective: Implement SQLite-backed state DB and state machine for pipeline orchestrator

steps.name: Analyze current repo and specs
steps.description: Scan relevant modules, docs, and config to understand the current state.

expected_outputs.description: Refined internal plan for changes (not persisted)

steps.name: Apply scoped edits in isolated worktree
steps.description: Use Aider/Codex to implement changes within declared file_scope in a dedicated worktree.

steps.name: Run static validation tools
steps.description: Run ruff, mypy, and other static tools via tool_profiles.

expected_outputs.description: All static tools pass or produce structured error output

steps.name: Run runtime tests
steps.description: Run pytest suite for modules touched by this phase.

placeholder_bindings.objective: Implement SQLite-backed state DB and state machine for pipeline orchestrator
placeholder_bindings.execution_steps_formatted:
[step-01-analyze-context] OP-ANALYZE-CONTEXT :: Analyze current repo and specs | patterns=PAT-ANALYZE-REPO-001 tool=codex human_confirm=false
[step-02-implement-changes] OP-EDIT-IMPLEMENT :: Apply scoped edits in isolated worktree | patterns=PAT-EDIT-WORKTREE-001,PAT-FILE-SCOPE-ENFORCE-001 tool=aider-edit human_confirm=false
[step-03-static-checks] OP-VALIDATE-STATIC :: Run static validation tools | patterns=PAT-LINT-001,PAT-TYPECHECK-001 tool=pytest human_confirm=false
[step-04-runtime-tests] OP-VALIDATE-RUNTIME :: Run runtime tests | patterns=PAT-PYTEST-CORE-001 tool=pytest human_confirm=false
placeholder_bindings.pre_flight_checks:
[pf-git-clean] Repo has no uncommitted changes in target paths. | cmd=powershell-script:git status --porcelain | success=^$ | on_fail=abort
[pf-venv-present] Python virtual env exists. | cmd=powershell-script:Test-Path .venv | success=True | on_fail=attempt_repair_phase
[pf-state-db-schema] State DB schema file exists where expected (if required for this phase). | cmd=powershell-script:Test-Path schema/pipeline_state.sql | success=True | on_fail=abort
placeholder_bindings.acceptance_tests:
[acc-01-pipeline-smoke] must_pass=true | Pipeline CLI can run a no-op workstream successfully. | cmd=powershell-script:python scripts/run_workstream.py --ws-id ws-xxx --dry-run | success=STATUS: SUCCESS
[acc-02-db-state-transitions] must_pass=true | State machine refuses invalid transitions. | cmd=pytest:pytest tests/pipeline/test_db_state.py -q | success=0 failed

prompt.rendered_prompt:
You are an AI operator executing Phase PH-XX of Workstream ws-xxx.

MISSION: Implement SQLite-backed state DB and state machine for pipeline orchestrator

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS:

File Scope Enforcement:
- You MAY ONLY modify files matching: src/pipeline/**/*.py, tests/pipeline/**/*.py
- You MAY create files in: schema/**/*.sql, docs/state/**/*.md, scripts/**/*.py
- You MAY read files in: README.md, docs/**/*.md, config/**/*.yaml
- You MUST NEVER touch: .git/**, .venv/**, .worktrees/**

Ground Truth Over Vibes:
- Trust git status, test output, and filesystem over conversational summaries
- Verify success with actual commands, not assumptions

NO STOP MODE:
- If a step fails, log the error and continue
- Execute ALL steps, collect ALL errors
- Report comprehensive results at the end

EXECUTION STEPS:
[step-01-analyze-context] OP-ANALYZE-CONTEXT :: Analyze current repo and specs | patterns=PAT-ANALYZE-REPO-001 tool=codex human_confirm=false
[step-02-implement-changes] OP-EDIT-IMPLEMENT :: Apply scoped edits in isolated worktree | patterns=PAT-EDIT-WORKTREE-001,PAT-FILE-SCOPE-ENFORCE-001 tool=aider-edit human_confirm=false
[step-03-static-checks] OP-VALIDATE-STATIC :: Run static validation tools | patterns=PAT-LINT-001,PAT-TYPECHECK-001 tool=pytest human_confirm=false
[step-04-runtime-tests] OP-VALIDATE-RUNTIME :: Run runtime tests | patterns=PAT-PYTEST-CORE-001 tool=pytest human_confirm=false

PRE-FLIGHT CHECKS (verify before starting):
[pf-git-clean] Repo has no uncommitted changes in target paths. | cmd=powershell-script:git status --porcelain | success=^$ | on_fail=abort
[pf-venv-present] Python virtual env exists. | cmd=powershell-script:Test-Path .venv | success=True | on_fail=attempt_repair_phase
[pf-state-db-schema] State DB schema file exists where expected (if required for this phase). | cmd=powershell-script:Test-Path schema/pipeline_state.sql | success=True | on_fail=abort

ACCEPTANCE TESTS (run after execution):
[acc-01-pipeline-smoke] must_pass=true | Pipeline CLI can run a no-op workstream successfully. | cmd=powershell-script:python scripts/run_workstream.py --ws-id ws-xxx --dry-run | success=STATUS: SUCCESS
[acc-02-db-state-transitions] must_pass=true | State machine refuses invalid transitions. | cmd=pytest:pytest tests/pipeline/test_db_state.py -q | success=0 failed

EXPECTED ARTIFACTS:
{"patches":[{"path":".ledger/patches/PH-XX_ws-xxx.patch","must_exist":true}],"logs":[{"path":".runs/ws-xxx/PH-XX/static_checks.log","must_exist":true},{"path":".runs/ws-xxx/PH-XX/runtime_tests.log","must_exist":true}],"docs":[{"path":"docs/state/state_machine.md","must_exist":true},{"path":"docs/architecture/PHASE_PLAN.md","must_exist":true}]}

ERROR HANDLING:
- Log error details to stderr
- Add to error collection list
- Continue with next step
- Report all errors in final summary

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
{"rules":{"dependencies_done":true,"pre_flight_passed":true,"acceptance_tests_all_passed":true,"required_artifacts_present":true,"no_scope_violations_detected":true,"circuit_breakers_not_tripped":true},"manual_override":{"allowed":false,"justification_required":true}}

OUTPUT FORMAT (provide structured JSON):
{
  "phase_id": "PH-XX",
  "status": "completed|failed|blocked",
  "errors": [],
  "warnings": [],
  "files_modified": [],
  "tests_passed": true|false,
  "artifacts_created": []
}

structural_validations.description: Required sections present; no additionalProperties at top-level

semantic_validations.rule: prompt_template_ref.sha256 must match computed hash of template

semantic_validations.description: All required placeholders bound; no unresolved placeholders in rendered_prompt
Scope lists non-empty; forbidden does not overlap allowlists
Every execution step has >=1 pattern_id OR explicit waiver
semantic_validations.rule: For each execution.steps[i], if pattern_ids is empty => step.pattern_waiver exists and reason non-empty

semantic_validations.description: No step references paths outside scope (best-effort static check)

toolchain_validations.description: Repo has no uncommitted changes in target paths

policy_validations.description: Forbidden paths must not be accessed
No secrets in patches or artifacts

tests.description: Pipeline CLI can run a no-op workstream successfully
